---
title: "W11-Hands-on Practice Assignment"
author: "Kathleen Juarez"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: true
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Website:

<https://kathleen-juarez.github.io/W11-Hands-on-Practice-Assignment-/>
